name: Loanability
description_short: Loanability provides flexible business financing including lines of credit, business loans, and receivables funding with fast approval and competitive rates for small businesses across all industries.
description_long:
Loanability was founded in October 2007 to serve as a flexible alternative to traditional business financing. The company has funded thousands of small businesses across all 50 states through various economic cycles. Initially focused on credit card-accepting retailers, Loanability has expanded to serve nearly every business type and positions itself as an industry leader in business financing through a focus on simple processes and customer service.

Loanability offers three primary funding solutions: lines of credit, business loans, and receivables funding. All products feature competitive pricing with terms up to 3 years and monthly payment options. The company emphasizes speed—offering approval within hours and funding in as little as one day. Their application process is conducted entirely online with minimal documentation requirements and no personal credit inquiries, with proceeds wired directly to business bank accounts upon approval.

The company differentiates itself through an explicit business philosophy of volume-based pricing rather than maximizing profit per loan. According to their stated model, Loanability prices loans to fund maximum loan volume, which they claim allows them to offer better terms than competitors. This approach has reportedly led to strong repeat business, with most clients returning for additional funding rounds. They serve a broad range of industries including healthcare, restaurants, construction, transportation, auto repair, hospitality, retail, technology, and manufacturing.

Loanability operates as a non-bank alternative lender with a straightforward value proposition around speed and simplicity. However, the website provides limited information about specific APR ranges, actual approval rates, or detailed eligibility requirements. No regulatory licensing information or third-party ratings are displayed. The lack of transparency about pricing specifics and terms compared to traditional lenders should be considered before applying.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fast approval timeline—offers available within hours and funding in as little as one day or two
Online-only application process with minimal documentation required
No personal credit inquiries as part of the application process
Terms up to 3 years with monthly payment options available
Serves broad range of business types and industries (50+ states coverage)
Auto-payment option for straightforward repayment management
Explicit stated philosophy of competitive pricing over profit maximization
cons: Website does not disclose specific APR ranges or actual interest rates, making cost comparison difficult
Limited transparency about actual approval rates or qualification requirements
No information about collateral requirements or personal guarantees
Receivables funding product details are minimal—no specifics on fees or terms
No third-party ratings, reviews, or regulatory licensing information provided on website
best_for: Small business owners needing fast working capital without traditional bank approval timelines
Established businesses with consistent revenue seeking lines of credit or equipment financing
Businesses with high-volume receivables looking for alternative funding without immediate collection pressure
diagnosis: Loanability is best for established small business owners who prioritize speed and simplicity over traditional bank financing, particularly those who may not qualify for conventional SBA loans or need capital within days rather than weeks. The main caveat is the lack of transparent pricing and rate information on their website—prospective borrowers should request detailed rate quotes and compare total costs across multiple lenders before committing.
services: Business loans with up to 3-year terms
Lines of credit with flexible draw options
Same-day or next-day funding via bank wire
Multi-industry financing (healthcare, restaurants, construction, transportation, retail, manufacturing, etc.)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 630 Fitzwatertown Rd Suite B1, Willow Grove, PA 19090
